title: Satisfiable Set of Propositional Formulas
statement:
Let \(\Gamma\subseteq\WFF\). The set \(\Gamma\) is satisfiable if there exists a
truth assignment \(v\) such that \(v\models\Gamma\).
\[
\operatorname{SatisfiableSet}(\Gamma)
\Longleftrightarrow
\exists v\,\bigl(\operatorname{TruthAssignment}(v)\land v\models\Gamma\bigr).
\]

current_dependencies.title: Satisfaction of a Set of Formulas
